title: Add load test for xz compressed images
body:
The auto decompression functionality was already vendored in
with containers/image. Adding a test for it.

Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/472

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @umohnani8 Test failures look legitimate, travis is failing too

@mheon I don't understand why it is failing - works fine for me locally.
Runs `/usr/bin/podman --root /tmp/podman_test196384510/crio --runroot /tmp/podman_test196384510/crio-run --runtime /usr/bin/runc --conmon /usr/libexec/podman/conmon --cni-config-dir /etc/cni/net.d --storage-driver=vfs save docker.io/library/alpine:latest | xz -zc - > /tmp/podman_test196384510/alpine.tar.xz`
And throws error `error parsing additional tags: invalid reference format`.

For me locally:
```
$ sudo podman save docker.io/library/alpine:latest | xz -zc - > /tmp/alp1.tar.xz
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:73046094a9b835e443af1a9d736fcfc11a994107500e474d0abf399499ed280c
 4.46 MB / 4.46 MB [========================================================] 1s
Copying config sha256:11cd0b38bc3ceb958ffb2f9bd70be3fb317ce7d255c8a4c3f4af30e298aa1aab
 1.48 KB / 1.48 KB [========================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
```
Travis runs ubuntu, could the 'xz' command not have the '-z' or '-c' param there?
@umohnani8 Try using the vfs storage driver?
@rhatdan works for me with vfs also.
@TomSweeneyRedHat looked at the man page for `xz` on ubuntu and -z and -c options exist.
I don't think it's xz, that error looks like it's coming out of c/image?
@mtrmac Mind taking a look? We're seeing a c/image error in CI but not when run locally.
@umohnani8 CI is fixed on master, can you rebase?
Rebased.
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit a7b83e4 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan a7b83e4f670b0fdf35a73c02d92372515a681a12 -->
:hourglass: Testing commit a7b83e4 with merge 380bf97...
:broken_heart: Test failed - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/libpod/380bf9768975c2df044af3e0838471de605445f2.1532706626725455104/index.html)
@umohnani8 Tests are failing.
bot, retest this please

Looks like the CI hosts don't have `xz` installed, see:

```
  unable to run command: xz /tmp/podman_test747436009/alpine.tar
```
@umohnani8 I think you need to modify .papr to add that requirement?
Tests pass! @rhatdan PTAL
@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit bfc3308 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan bfc33081f5e250b19c0cd06d6694ce9bef4d1807 -->
:zap: Test exempted: merge already tested.
